## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Privacy and Security Impact

- [ ] Document processing remains local to the browser.
- [ ] No document contents, filenames, metadata, or workflow data are sent off-device.
- [ ] No analytics, telemetry, advertising, or tracking was added.
- [ ] Any new network behavior, external service, remote API, CDN asset, external font, browser storage, logging, or dependency is described below.
- [ ] Tests and documentation cover any privacy- or security-sensitive behavior.

Privacy/security details, or `None`:

## Review Notes

Call out tradeoffs, follow-up work, or areas that deserve particular review.
